ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded for the day */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity recorded for the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded for the day */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded for the day */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded for the day */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is of high quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last maintained */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., airport, rural, urban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the client subscribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_roles" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics tool */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tool is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_tools" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analytics tool */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., historical, real-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
